apps.evidence: Candidate from POPULAR_RN_APPS_ANALYSIS_PLAN.md; verified by React Native JS bundle markers in retained Discord IPAs.
notes: Discord baseline was regenerated under reports/discord with the app-agnostic tools.
Existing root-level Discord CSV/JSON outputs remain the regression baseline.
Native executables are FairPlay encrypted in analyzed IPAs, so exact native RN constants are not inspectable.

apps.evidence: Candidate from POPULAR_RN_APPS_ANALYSIS_PLAN.md; App Store URL https://apps.apple.com/us/app/facebook/id284882215; ipatool search resolved bundle ID com.facebook.Facebook.

RN usage was not verified because ipatool list-versions failed before sampling.
ipatool list-versions failed for both app ID 284882215 and bundle ID com.facebook.Facebook with Apple's generic unknown error.
ipatool purchase also failed with unsupported protocol scheme before a license could be obtained.

apps.evidence: Candidate from POPULAR_RN_APPS_ANALYSIS_PLAN.md; App Store URL https://apps.apple.com/us/app/messenger/id454638411; ipatool search resolved bundle ID com.facebook.Messenger.
notes: Registered for analysis on 2026-05-25.
Version list fetched on 2026-05-25.
Initial 12-point sample found one RN-marked build: 131.0 (68165081), external version ID 823243677.
Boundary midpoint refinement found another RN-marked build: 98.0 (44186053), external version ID 819781397.
Second midpoint refinement found 81.0 unknown and 145.0 RN-marked, narrowing both windows.
Third midpoint refinement found 89.0 unknown and 153.0 unknown, narrowing both windows again.
Fourth midpoint refinement found 93.0 RN-marked and 149.0 unknown.
Boundary refinement reached exact adjacency: 91.0 unknown -> 92.0 RN, and 147.0 RN -> 148.0 unknown.
Disk cleanup reviewed on 2026-05-25; no Messenger IPAs deleted because 240 GiB remained free.
Final validation passed: scripts compile, CSV/JSON reports parse, transition rows are backed by versions.csv, and exact boundaries are adjacent in version-list.json.
Other sampled Messenger builds did not expose JS bundles and remain unknown from encrypted IPA inspection.

apps.evidence: Candidate from POPULAR_RN_APPS_ANALYSIS_PLAN.md; App Store URL https://apps.apple.com/us/app/instagram/id389801252; ipatool search resolved bundle ID com.burbn.instagram.
notes: Registered for analysis on 2026-05-25.
Version list fetched on 2026-05-25 using bundle identifier after app-id lookup returned Apple's generic unknown error.
Initial 12-point sample found RN-marked builds from 10.10.0 (50667367), external version ID 821056195, through 58.0 (120248682), external version ID 828138988.
Boundary midpoint refinement found 7.19.1 unknown and 89.0 RN-marked, narrowing both transition windows.
Second midpoint refinement found 9.3.0 unknown and 104.0 with RN 0.60.x markers, adding an internal RN upgrade window.
Third midpoint refinement found 10.0.1 RN <=0.59.x, 96.1 RN 0.60.x, and 111.0 RN 0.61.x, adding a 0.60.x -> 0.61.x window.
Fourth midpoint refinement narrowed all four windows; latest known range endpoints are 9.5.1, 10.0.1, 89.0, 92.0, 104.0, 107.0, 111.0, and 115.0.
Final boundary refinement downloaded the 13 remaining external version IDs across the four windows.
Boundary refinement reached exact App Store adjacency: 9.7.0 unknown -> 10.0.0 RN, 90.0 RN <=0.59.x -> 91.0 RN 0.60.x, 105.0 RN 0.60.x -> 106.0 RN 0.61.x, and 113.0 RN 0.61.x -> 114.0 unknown.
Duplicate external IDs for 91.0 and 106.0 map to the same app builds; range starts use the earliest duplicate external ID for exact App Store adjacency.
Disk cleanup reviewed on 2026-05-26; no Instagram IPAs deleted because ipas/instagram used 3.7 GiB and 236 GiB remained free.
Final validation passed: scripts compile, CSV/JSON reports parse, and all four transition rows are adjacent in version-list.json.
Other sampled Instagram builds did not expose JS bundles and remain unknown from encrypted IPA inspection.

apps.android_history_source: APKMirror and APKPure history pages for package com.instagram.barcelona
apps.evidence: Candidate from POPULAR_RN_APPS_ANALYSIS_PLAN.md; ipatool search Threads resolved App Store ID 6446901002 and bundle ID com.burbn.barcelona; APKMirror/APKPure pages identify Android package com.instagram.barcelona.
notes: Registered for analysis on 2026-05-26.
iOS identifier source: ipatool search Threads --format json returned ID 6446901002, bundle ID com.burbn.barcelona, current listed version 431.0.
Android package source: APKMirror/APKPure history pages for Threads list package com.instagram.barcelona.
iOS version list fetched on 2026-05-26: 182 external version IDs from 855897532 through 885819877.
Android APKPure catalog fetched on 2026-05-26: 10 visible entries from versionCode 504412928 through 510007506; source page appears to expose a limited history.

Initial Android sampling downloaded and analyzed all 10 APKPure catalog entries. Version 374.0.0.43.110 exposes React Native native-library metadata (reactnativejni, react_featureflagsjni, yoga); 2026 XAPK samples do not expose RN markers with the current split-package analyzer.

Initial iOS sampling downloaded and analyzed 12 evenly spaced App Store external version IDs from 855897532 through 885819877. No iOS sample exposed JS bundle markers, so iOS rows remain unknown from encrypted IPA inspection.

Initial sampling validation passed: Android/iOS CSV and JSON reports parse, Android reports include RN native-library evidence for versionCode 504412928, and cross-app reports include platform-labeled Threads rows.

Android boundary refinement added APKPure page versions 382.0.0.51.85 (versionCode 505205644) and 400.0.0.38.68 (versionCode 507007017); 382.0.0 still exposes RN native metadata, while 400.0.0 does not. The source-limited Android marker-disappearance window is now 382.0.0.51.85 -> 400.0.0.38.68.

Marked needs_manual_review because APKMirror appears to have more boundary versions but automated fetches return Cloudflare challenges, APKPure exposes only sparse historical pages, and iOS samples remain unknown due encrypted IPA inspection.

apps.android_history_source: APKMirror and APKPure history pages for package com.oculus.twilight
apps.evidence: Candidate from POPULAR_RN_APPS_ANALYSIS_PLAN.md; ipatool search Meta Horizon resolved App Store ID 1366478176 and bundle ID com.oculus.twilight; Google Play/APKPure/APKMirror pages identify Android package com.oculus.twilight.
notes: Registered for analysis on 2026-05-26.
iOS identifier source: ipatool search Meta Horizon --format json returned ID 1366478176, bundle ID com.oculus.twilight, current listed version 372.1.
Android package source: Google Play, APKPure, and APKMirror pages list package com.oculus.twilight.
iOS version list fetch failed on 2026-05-26 because ipatool list-versions requires an App Store license for com.oculus.twilight; ipatool purchase failed with unsupported protocol scheme.
Android APKPure catalog fetched on 2026-05-26 and expanded with parseable APKPure direct pages: 30 entries from versionCode 651148422 through 975394013; the source remains sparse and non-adjacent.
APKMirror appears to have older Meta Horizon/Meta Quest packages but automated fetches returned a Cloudflare challenge.
Initial Android sampling downloaded and analyzed all 10 visible APKPure catalog entries. Boundary refinement expanded that to 30 APKPure entries, including older parseable direct pages.

Every sampled APK exposes assets/TwilightBundle.js.hbc and React Native native-library metadata. The current analyzer reports Android source-limited bands: 287.3.0.33.109 as 0.78.x high-confidence, 341.0.0.17.107 through 349.2.0.46.104 as 0.60.x medium-confidence, and 360.0.0.23.322 through 372.0.1.34.252 as <=0.59.x medium-confidence.

Marked needs_manual_review because APKPure gaps are large, APKMirror is blocked by Cloudflare, iOS sampling is blocked by the App Store license failure, and the apparent 0.60.x -> <=0.59.x Android transition is not trustworthy enough to treat as a definitive app-wide RN downgrade without stronger package evidence.

notes: Registered for analysis on 2026-05-26.
iOS identifier source: ipatool search Shopify --format json returned ID 371294472, bundle ID com.jadedpixel.shopify, current listed version 10.2621.0.
Android package source: APKPure search and Google Play search identify package com.shopify.mobile.
iOS version list fetched on 2026-05-26: 508 external version IDs from 821337490 through 886020173.
Android APKPure catalog fetched on 2026-05-26 and expanded with parseable direct pages: 24 entries from versionCode 193814 through 281050; source page appears to expose a limited history.
Initial Android sampling downloaded and analyzed all 10 visible APKPure entries. Boundary refinement expanded that to 24 APKPure entries, including older parseable direct pages.

Every sampled XAPK exposes assets/index.android.bundle and React Native native-library metadata including libreactnative.so. The current analyzer reports Android source-limited bands: 10.2543.0 through 10.2605.0 as 0.79.x medium-confidence, and 10.2606.1 through 10.2620.0 as 0.60.x medium-confidence.

Marked needs_manual_review because APKPure is sparse/source-limited, iOS has not been sampled, and the apparent 0.79.x -> 0.60.x Android transition is not trustworthy enough to treat as a definitive app-wide RN downgrade without stronger package evidence.

notes: Registered for analysis on 2026-05-26.

Android package source: APKPure search and Google Play search identify package com.shopify.arrive.

Initial Android sampling downloaded and analyzed all 10 visible APKPure entries. Every sampled XAPK exposes assets/index.android.bundle, react-native-renderer 19.1.0, and React Native native-library metadata including libreactnative.so; all samples classify as 0.81.x with high confidence.
